# mrclean test fixture — synthetic invalid value for detection pattern testing
# Source: GitHub Fine-Grained Personal Access Token format — github_pat_ prefix + exactly 82 \w chars
# Checksum-flip: body consists entirely of 'A' chars — structurally shaped but invalid
# Token = github_pat_ (10) + 82 word chars = 92 chars total
# License: test fixture only — not a real credential

The fine-grained token github_pat_11ABCDE0000000000000000000_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA grants repo-scoped access.
